message:
fix(database): add Drop impl for PgConnectionInner to ensure socket shutdown on drop

Add a Drop implementation for PgConnectionInner that calls
stream.shutdown(Both) if the connection was not explicitly closed. This
prevents socket/fd leaks when a PgConnection is dropped without calling
close() — e.g., on panic, early return, or cancellation. Also add an
explicit stream.shutdown() in the close() method before marking closed,
ensuring the TCP socket is properly torn down even if the Terminate message
write fails.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
